cases.text: The synthetic trajectory from LEMD to LFPG, a distance of 1063 km, is estimated to take 112 minutes and consume 4197 kg of modeled trip fuel.  It represents an efficiency improvement of 23 kg compared to the baseline, with a minimal time difference.
